name: nginx_ingress_controller
explanation: The check inherits OpenMetricsBaseCheck and scrapes a single fixed Prometheus endpoint at http://%%host%%:10254/metrics. The /metrics endpoint exposed by the kubernetes/ingress-nginx controller on port 10254 is universal, unauthenticated, and well documented. Discovery reduces to probing that port + path.
notes: No auto_conf.yaml ships in the integration repo, but the discovery path is straightforward (single fixed port and path).
